titleStmt.title: SII 27.176: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 176. (A.R. No. 605 of 1929-30.) MATPĀḌI, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in a field to the east of the village.

This badly damaged record is dated Śaka 14[46] (expired), (1447 current), Vyaya, Kārttika śu. 12, Tuesday. The cyclic year Vyaya corresponds to Śaka 1448 when tithi occured on October 16, 1536 A.D., Tuesday, f.d.t. ·26. If the year is taken as Śaka 1446, then the details correspond to 1524 A.D., November 8.

It registers a gift to a Brāhmaṇa (name lost), son of Nāgarasa of Yajuś-śākha, Āpastambha-sūtra, and Kauṇḍinya-gōtra, by Viṭharasa-voḍeya, son of karaṇika Lakshmīnārāyaṇa-voḍeya, who was governing Bārakūrurājya. The details of the grant cannot be made out.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīgaṇādhipatayē nama .
namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē . trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śāṁ
bhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣa 1446 saṁdu [vartamāna Eḷaneya vyaya] saṁ
vatsarada kārtika śu 12 maṁ U śrī maṁnmahā rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa
rumalarāya mahārāyaru vijeyanāgaradalū
yāgi sakalavarnadharṁmāśramavanu pratipālisutihali bārakūra rā
jyavanu karaṇika lakṣmīnārāyaṇa Oḍeyaṁge Avara kumāra viṭharsa Oḍeyaru rājyavanāḷuva
kāladalu viṭharsa Oḍeyaru yajuśśākheya Āpastaṁba sūtrada kauṁḍinya gōtrada nāgarasaramaga
rige koṭa śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare The rest of the is badly damaged.
Digital edition of SII 27.176 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
